title: galium obtusum var. floridanum
intro: Galium obtusum var. floridanum is a variety of the Galium obtusum plant, a perennial herb native to Florida and the southeastern United States. It is also known as Florida bedstraw or short-beaked bedstraw, and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Galium obtusum var. floridanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system.
